species.citation: (Willd.) Alston , Reinwardtia 5 (1959) 16 ; Romeroso et al., J. Asia-Pacific biodiv. 17 (2024) 11; De Villa & Lagat, PJS 153 (2024) 1823; ≡ Hydroglossum auriculatum Willd. , Sp. (Cavanilles) 6 (1801) 74, nom. illeg.

species.notes: Terrestrial, usually in thickets and disturbed forests.
